text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One particular day off, I'm passing by the
academy entrance when...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Wh-wh-why are there so many couples today?
A-and they're kissing? IN PUBLIC?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
D-dammit! That motorcycle photo book is gonna
sell out if I don't get a move on!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Hey, you! Y'know of any ways to avoid the love
fest happenin' on the main road?!
choice_data_list: Run as fast as you can.

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
The side roads! I totally forgot I could use them
instead!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
They're all twisty 'n' turny, but it's my only way! I'll
just have to put the pedal to the metal!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Okay, I'll catch ya later! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...Just so you know, I'm not afraid of k-ki—things
like that! So don't get the wrong idea!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Run as fast as I can?! Oh, I get it! If I zoom past,
then I won't have to see 'em making out!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I'mma do just that! I've just gotta run faster
than the speed of light!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Aw, yeah! Nothin's gonna scare me now! Thanks!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
...N-not that it was that big of a deal anyway! I
just hate that wishy-washy romance garbage!
Don't get the wrong idea!
